---
title: "Working Paper Title"
author:
  - name: Dan Olner
    orcid: 0000-0000-0000-0000
    affiliation: Your Affiliation
date: last-modified
format:
  html:
    toc: true
  pdf:
    toc: true
    number-sections: true
abstract: |
  Abstract goes here. This working paper assembles modular components
  developed openly at [GitHub repo link] with feedback from [list key
  contributors/organisations].
keywords:
  - regional economics
  - subnational statistics
bibliography: references.bib
---

## Introduction

## Background

## Methods

{{< include ../../modules/expected-vs-observed/method.qmd >}}

## Results

## Discussion

## Conclusion

## Acknowledgements

This work was developed openly with feedback from [list contributors, referencing GitHub issues where applicable]. All modules, code, and data are available at [repo DOI link].

## References
